goal: Wire ambient audio, horror lighting, NavigationRegion3D, and perimeter patrol waypoints.
summary: Phase 4 'Audio, lighting, navigation' complete. Audio: 4 autoplaying AudioStreamPlayer3D nodes (Ambient_Drone, Ambient_Furnace, SFX_WaterDrip, SFX_DistantBell). Lighting: 6 OmniLight3D nodes (FurnaceGlow orange 4m, 5 wall torches dim yellow 3-5m, flooded section dark). Navigation: NavigationRegion3D with NavigationMesh and 16 perimeter Waypoint Marker3D nodes forming a loop across all quadrants.
stepSummaries:
1. Add AudioStreamPlayer3D nodes for Ambient_Drone, Ambient_Furnace, and SFX_WaterDrip with autoplay. [verified]
  2. Add OmniLight3D nodes: furnace glow (orange, ~4m), wall torches (dim yellow, 3-5m), flooded section dark. [verified]
  3. Add NavigationRegion3D with NavigationMesh and 10+ waypoints in group 'Waypoint' forming a perimeter loop. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: All three steps had real verification: audio counts and stream references; light counts, colors, ranges, flooded-section absence; waypoint counts, NavigationRegion3D presence, perimeter distribution, and bracket balance.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: 4 AudioStreamPlayer3D, 4 autoplay, correct ext_resources; Step 2: 6 OmniLight3D, FurnaceGlow range 4.0, 5 torches, no flooded lights, brackets 690/690; Step 3: 16 waypoints, x/z span 48, NavigationRegion3D present.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal was to wire ambient audio, horror lighting, NavigationRegion3D, and perimeter patrol waypoints. All wired and verified.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Scenes/Floors/F1_Basement.tscn contains World/Audio with 4 players, World/Lighting with 6 lights, World/Navigation with NavigationRegion3D and 16 Waypoint markers.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase. All planned work completed.
